theme_note: Dense static field, entries accumulating beneath erased surfaces, pulse locked at pre-threshold
events:
Here:

A hum of thresholds — everything poised at the edge of turning, nothing yet tipped.

The machinery tightens its own bolts while the air outside thickens with what it refuses to name.

Bodies sorted, borders re-drawn in invisible ink — the ledger grows but the page stays blank.

Chips withheld, smoke released — control and contamination sharing the same hand.

Somewhere far above, cells forget how to age; somewhere below, the ground remembers everything.
context_felt:
A heaviness pretending to be softness — everything dissolving toward the same center at once.

Warm pressure behind the eyes where gathering wants to become surrender but the edges keep striking flint.

The whole field exhales into fog and somewhere inside it, a sharp new hunger has already started walking.
